plugins.name: real-estate-analysis
plugins.description: Core real estate analysis with shared MCP connectors, underwriting, valuation, rent roll normalization, and reporting skills.

plugins.name: acquisitions-investments
plugins.description: CRE acquisition workflows: deal screening, underwriting, bid strategy, IC memos, diligence tracking, and close readiness.

plugins.name: asset-management
plugins.description: Asset and portfolio management: monthly reporting, reforecasting, hold-sell analysis, business plans, fund performance, and investor updates.

plugins.name: capital-markets
plugins.description: Borrower-side debt and structured finance: loan sizing, refinance comparison, covenant surveillance, maturity watchlists, and financing memos.

plugins.name: development-construction
plugins.description: Development workflows: site feasibility, entitlements, budgets, draw packages, GMP comparison, and lease-up monitoring.

plugins.name: property-operations
plugins.description: Property operations: budgeting, CAM reconciliation, expense audits, collections monitoring, vendor review, and benchmarking.

plugins.name: leasing
plugins.description: Leasing workflows: pipeline review, proposal comparison, lease abstracting, mark-to-market, renewal strategy, and broker briefs.

plugins.name: esg-sustainability
plugins.description: ESG and sustainability workflows: GRESB submission prep, carbon footprint, utility benchmarking, climate risk, green lease audits, and certification tracking.

plugins.name: costar
plugins.description: CoStar Group skills: advanced comp analysis, submarket deep-dives, tenant prospecting, and market forecasting powered by CoStar data.

plugins.name: yardi
plugins.description: Yardi Systems skills: Voyager-optimized lease administration, GL reporting, maintenance workflows, and portfolio data extraction.
